codeset.draftBlockedHint: An open version v{{version}} already exists. Complete its workflow or delete the DRAFT first.

version.title: Versions
version.deleteConfirmDescription: All CodeItems of this DRAFT will be removed. This action is irreversible.

items.title: Items
items.keyPartsHint: Single code: "S1". Composite key: JSON array, e.g. ["RETAIL","BB","12M"].
items.attributesHint: Validated server-side against the active CodeSetSchema. Leave empty for no attributes.
items.deleteConfirmDescription: The item will be removed from the current DRAFT version.
items.optimisticConflict: The item was modified by another user. Data refreshed — please retry.
items.parentKeyHint: Parent node key for hierarchy. Empty = root node. Composite: JSON array.
items.descriptionHint: Extended description for the item. Stored in DB, exposed via distribution API.

tree.dragHint: Drag a node onto another to change its parent_key. Drop in the gap = sibling.
tree.dropCycle: Cannot drop a node into its own subtree (would create a cycle)

closure.rebuildTooltip: Disaster-recovery: rebuild the closure-table for this version (admin)
closure.rebuildConfirmDescription: TRUNCATE + WITH RECURSIVE walk over current code_item. Only needed for incident recovery — normally maintained by triggers V022/V023.

consumer.title: Bitemporal view (consumer side)
consumer.asOfHint: Business date: "which reference data was active on this date?"
consumer.knowledgeAsOfHint: System date: "what did we know at this moment?" — bitemporal, for regulatory reproducibility.
consumer.label: Label

bulk.title: Bulk import items
bulk.empty: Body is empty — paste data or upload a file
bulk.jsonHint: Array of NewItem objects (key_parts is required). Attributes validated against the active CodeSetSchema.
bulk.csvHint: CSV with header row. Columns: key_parts, label_ru, label_en, attributes (as JSON string), order_index, status, effective_from, effective_to.
bulk.dropJson: Drop a .json file here or click to select
bulk.dropCsv: Drop a .csv file here or click to select

diff.title: Diff vs v{{version}}
diff.pickPrompt: Pick a version to compare against

subs.title: Outbound webhook subscriptions
subs.deleteConfirmDescription: The subscription stops receiving events. The row is not physically deleted (FK on webhook_outbox + audit).
subs.notAdminDescription: Subscription management is restricted to users with the RDM_ADMIN role.

fld.urlInvalid: Invalid URL (full scheme required, e.g. https://… or http://…)
fld.urlHint: Backend POSTs each event's payload here (JSON + X-RDM-Signature).
fld.secretIdHint: Vault/SOPS key id; backend resolves the HMAC secret from this pointer. The secret itself is never stored in DB.
fld.filterHint: Inside each field: OR; across fields: AND. An empty field places no restriction on that axis.
fld.activeHint: If off — subscription is created but won't receive events until manually activated (V1+).

audit.title: Audit log
audit.notAdminDescription: Audit log access is restricted to users with the RDM_ADMIN or RDM_AUDITOR role.

export.tooltip: Downloads the audit journal with applied filters as a file. CSV for Excel/spreadsheets, NDJSON for jq and stream parsing. Available to RDM_ADMIN or RDM_AUDITOR.

verify.tooltip: Recomputes the SHA-256 hash-chain of the audit journal and matches it against the stored values. Available to RDM_ADMIN.
verify.title: Audit chain integrity check
verify.okSubtitle: Verified {{checked}} entries (#{{from}} … #{{to}}). prev_hash and entry_hash match for every entry in the range.
verify.brokenSubtitle: First break — entry #{{firstBrokenAt}}. This means the entry has been modified after being recorded, or the chain was not restored after PITR. Contact compliance.

modal.commentPlaceholder: Describe the reason — the draft author will see it
